title: Draconic Archer's Moon Bundle
description: Add-ons for Enhanced Celestials all bundled into one
body:
Do you want several of my moon mods all in one mod? Well, here you go!

This bundle includes:
Horde Moon, which increases Zombie spawns
Spider Moon, which increases Spider spawns,
Black Moon, which gives you blindness for the night,
Hunter's Moon, which increases mob drops for the night,
Miner's Moon, which increases ore drops for the night
Peaceful Moon, which prevents new hostile mobs from naturally spawning.
Don't want all the moons, or want to configure the frequency?
Make a quick datapack by following CorgiTaco's Wiki

 

Looking for more moons?
My other moons include:

Baby Horde Moon
The Extreme Horde Moon
The Sniper's Moon
The Ender Moon
The Kaboom Moon
The Chaos Moon
